plate.comment:
[CONFORMANCE] shadow_leaf (live-pointer getter): a scalar-typed pointer param (Ghidra int* or short*) is used as a live-STRUCT base -- indexed at a nonzero offset or double-dereferenced -- NOT a scalar in/out value. Not statically emulable; SHADOW-provable against the running game. If a double-deref proves an extra pointer level, correct the prototype.

Returns the first position coordinate from a skill node.

Source: ..\Source\D2Common\Skills.cpp

Algorithm:
1. Check if pSkillNode is NULL
2. If NULL, call GetReturnAddress(), CleanupAndAbort(), then exit(-1) [WARNING: does not return]
3. Return the DWORD value at pSkillNode + 0x18 (first position field)

Parameters:
  pSkillNode: SKILLS_SkillNode * - skill node pointer [must not be NULL]

Returns:
  uint: Position value 1 from pSkillNode + 0x18. Aborts if pSkillNode is NULL.

Special Cases:
  - NULL pSkillNode: Explicitly checked and causes process termination

Structure Layout:
  Offset | Size | Field    | Type  | Description
  +0x18  | 4    | dwPos1   | uint  | First position coordinate (set by SetSkillTargetPosition)
  (Other fields not accessed by this function)

tags.name: CONF_LIVE
tags.comment: CONF axis (equivalence proof), rung 3/4. Proven bit-exact LIVE via the D2Debugger direct-call oracle on chosen inputs against the running game (GRADUATED_CONFORMANCE_PIPELINE_PLAN.md). Mutually exclusive with CONF_DRAFT/CONF_VECTORS/CONF_BATTLETESTED.
